programme.desc: The outrageous true story of Jordan Belfort, a young stockbroker hungry for a life of non-stop thrills, where corruption was king and more was never enough. His rise to power earned him the title The Wolf of Wall Street.

programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: This foot-stomping celebration traces the story of legendary rock band Queen, their unforgettable music, and their extraordinary lead singer, Freddie Mercury.

programme.title: Gone Girl
programme.desc: On his fifth wedding anniversary, Nick reports his wife missing. As his portrait of a blissful union begins to crumble, suspicions of murder build.

programme.title: Hereditary
programme.desc: After the matriarch of the Graham family passes away, her daughter&amp;apos;s family begin to unearth cryptic and disturbing secrets about their ancestry.

programme.title: Edge of Darkness
programme.desc: As homicide detective Thomas Craven investigates the murder of his activist daughter, he uncovers corporate corruption and a deadly high-level conspiracy.

programme.title: Fargo
programme.desc: Minnesota car salesman Jerry Lundegaard&amp;apos;s inept crime falls apart due to his own bungling, his incompetent henchman, and the persistent police work of a pregnant police chief.

programme.title: Armageddon
programme.desc: A space crew attempt to destroy a Texas-sized asteroid hurtling towards Earth.

programme.desc: Secret Service agent Mike Banning springs into action to save the captive U.S. President from a terrorist group who have attacked London.

programme.title: Side Effects
programme.desc: A young woman's life begins to unravel when a new drug prescribed by her psychiatrist has unusual side effects.

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: An elderly Margaret Thatcher and her husband's ghost reflect on her life - from childhood to becoming the longest serving British Prime Minister.
